ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the competition (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competition's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the event belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., piping, drumming, ensemble) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., senior, junior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the band */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the band was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the band */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the band's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Judge's area of expertise (e.g., piping, drumming) */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Relevant certifications */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the score belongs to */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the band the score belongs to */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who awarded the score */,
  "piping_score" INTEGER /* Score awarded for piping */,
  "drumming_score" INTEGER /* Score awarded for drumming */,
  "ensemble_score" INTEGER /* Score awarded for ensemble */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score awarded */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the judge */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the band the result belongs to */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the band in the event */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score of the band in the event */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the band's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_bands" (
  "event_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-band pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_bands_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_bands_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_judges" (
  "event_judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-judge pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_judges_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_judges_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_history" (
  "score_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score history entry */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the score update */,
  "piping_score" INTEGER /* Score awarded for piping at the time of update */,
  "drumming_score" INTEGER /* Score awarded for drumming at the time of update */,
  "ensemble_score" INTEGER /* Score awarded for ensemble at the time of update */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score awarded at the time of update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the score */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the user who updated the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
